title: Constitutive Model Calibration (Simplified Input)
description: A user-friendly form to record a constitutive model calibration: the experimental stress-strain data that went in, the model family fitted, and the resulting model parameters. This input will be automatically converted to a standardised RDF representation (OBI/PMDCo OO-LD).

step_name.title: Calibration Name
step_name.description: A human-readable name for this calibration run. Example: 'Hockett-Sherby calibration 316L batch 1'.

step_id.title: Step ID
step_id.description: Optional. IRI slug for this calibration node. Auto-derived from step_name if omitted.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional free-text description of this calibration.

model_type.title: Constitutive Model
model_type.description: The constitutive model family fitted in this calibration.

inputs.title: Input Dataset IRIs
inputs.description: IRIs of the experimental datasets (e.g. tensile test results) used as calibration input.

outputs.title: Output Material Card IRIs
outputs.description: IRIs of the material cards or parameter datasets produced by this calibration.

preceded_by.title: Preceded By (Step IRIs)
preceded_by.description: IRIs of steps that directly precede this calibration.

conditions.title: Calibration Settings
conditions.description: Algorithmic settings for the calibration (e.g. optimiser, strain range, number of iterations).

calibrated_parameters.title: Calibrated Parameters
calibrated_parameters.description: The fitted model parameters. Use the canonical symbol as the name (e.g. 'sigma_sat', 'c', 'n').
